name: execute_swap
description: Execute a trust-verified token swap on Base chain. Includes 10-point safety audit (honeypot, tax, pool quality, holder concentration) before execution. Custodial: tokens are transferred, swapped on-chain, and returned automatically.

tokenIn.description: Token to sell — symbol (USDC, WETH, ETH) or 0x address

tokenOut.description: Token to buy — symbol or 0x address

amountIn.description: Amount to sell in human-readable units (e.g. '10.5')

slippage.description: Max slippage in percent (e.g. '1.0'). Optional — auto-detected.
